title: Leochilus tricuspidatus

Leochilus tricuspidatus belongs to the family Orchidaceae and the subfamily Cranichideae. It is a genus of orchids and a species within the Leochilus. The classification of Leochilus tricuspidatus is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Angiospermophyta, Class: Liliopsida, Order: Asparagales, Family: Orchidaceae, Subfamily: Cranichideae, Genus: Leochilus, Species: L. tricuspidatus. This species is native to Central and South America and is part of the orchid family, known for its diverse and widespread species. The classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
